a.xlink:title: Phase-based autonomous planner compatible with ReplanStep.
Drive in a straight line for targetDistance meters at targetVelocity m/s.
Commands the drive to follow a radius-constrained arc until an angle or distance target is met.
Follow the floor line at a fixed velocity for _target meters.
Polymorphic interface for a robot subsystem.
Servo-driven block-mining and ramp-deployment subsystem.
Rack-and-pinion block shooter controlled by encoder feedback.
Quadrature encoder driver with velocity and acceleration estimation.
Pololu QTR-MD-08RC 8-channel line sensor driver.
Dual-channel closed-loop motor controller.
Full-featured PID controller with anti-windup, output filtering, and optional nonlinear extensions.
Lightweight PID controller base class.
Sharp GP2Y0A51 analog IR distance sensor driver.
Tracks robot pose by integrating encoder wheel displacements.
2-D robot pose.
Mine a block by executing a set number of servo press cycles.
Servo driver with angle clamping, inversion, and deferred writes.
Digital button / limit-switch driver.
Pure-virtual base class for all autonomous steps.
Push the block into the left or right slot of the hopper based on Strategy::IndexDirection.
Placeholder step for placing a block on the crafting table at the correct cycle position.
Calls Strategy::advanceCycle() once in start() and immediately finishes.
